description: Vertical candid photograph with no on-image graphic design, captions, or seals overlaid. The scene is outdoors in bright daylight against a tan and red brick wall topped by a black wrought-iron spiked security fence under a clear blue sky (consistent with the Southern California or Burbank location in the tweet). Three people stand facing the wall: at left a female officer wearing a navy windbreaker with large yellow block lettering reading 'ATF POLICE' across the back, her hair in a bun, with jeans and sneakers; in the center a middle-aged man (face pixelated) in a blue-and-gray striped polo shirt and jeans, his hands cuffed behind his back; at right a male officer in a tan/khaki short-sleeve uniform shirt with a black tactical vest bearing yellow 'FEDERAL AGENT' lettering, a ball cap, olive-green tactical pants, and a holstered sidearm. The agent has his hands on the cuffed man. The only text is on the agents' apparel (ATF POLICE, FEDERAL AGENT).
notable_text: ATF POLICE; FEDERAL AGENT (apparel only, no overlaid graphic text)
